parameters.window_note: Strict 72h window (Jun 5-8) yielded 0 items not already in the 2026-06-07 bulletin. Expanded to 7 days (Jun 1-8) to include Jun 1 S-1 filing and recover items dropped from Jun 7 due to insufficient primary detail at that run time.

items.title: GitHub Copilot desktop app expands technical preview to all paid Copilot tiers

key_claims.claim: Technical preview available to all Copilot Pro, Pro+, Business, Enterprise customers
Parallel agent sessions via isolated git worktrees
Three modes: Interactive, Plan, Autopilot

items.caveats: Technical preview — not GA. GA timeline not disclosed.

items.title: Anthropic separates Agent SDK into standalone monthly credit pool starting June 15
items.tier_note: No dedicated Anthropic blog post URL confirmed; The New Stack and TechTimes (T2) independently confirm June 15 date and credit amounts.

key_claims.claim: Pro: $20/month, Max 5x: $100/month, Max 20x: $200/month
Agent SDK, claude -p, Claude Code GitHub Actions, third-party agents move to credit pool
Interactive Claude Code terminal sessions unaffected
Credits expire monthly without rollover

items.caveats: Primary Anthropic announcement URL not confirmed. Verify against Anthropic API documentation before acting on billing configuration changes.

items.title: Headroom reaches 16.9k stars — open-source context compression layer for LLM agents

key_claims.claim: 60-95% token reduction with maintained answer accuracy
v0.23.0 released 2026-06-04; 16.9k stars, 1.1k forks
Four modes: library, proxy, MCP server, agent wrapper

items.caveats: Stars-only adoption signal. 60-95% range is best-case on author-selected benchmarks. No independent evaluation available.

items.title: Anthropic maps 832 AI-enabled threat actor cases to MITRE ATT&CK
items.coi: Anthropic analyzed its own banned accounts; no third-party audit of methodology.

key_claims.claim: 832 banned accounts analyzed, March 2025-March 2026
Medium-risk-or-higher actors rose from 33% to 56%
67.3% used AI for malware writing or attack preparation
AI account discovery +8.9%, AI-assisted phishing -8.6%
MITRE ATT&CK lacks categories for AI-autonomous attack chaining

items.caveats: Sample is Anthropic's own banned accounts — not a random or representative sample of all AI-enabled threat actors. Risk classification methodology not externally audited.

items.title: Anthropic launches Services Track and Partner Hub within Claude Partner Network
items.source_note: June 3 item confirmed via Anthropic news index direct fetch

key_claims.claim: Services Track recognizes firms delivering Claude implementations professionally
$100M investment for Partner Network in 2026
Claude Certified Architect certification available at launch
Partner-facing team scaling fivefold

items.caveats: $100M figure and team expansion are Anthropic self-reported. Eligibility criteria for Services Track not fully disclosed in available sources.

items.title: Anthropic confidentially files draft S-1 with the SEC for a proposed IPO
items.window_note: June 1 falls outside the 2026-06-07 bulletin window (Jun 2-7); included here under 7-day expansion.

key_claims.claim: Confidential draft S-1 submitted to SEC June 1, 2026
No share count or price determined at filing
$965B post-money valuation, $65B Series H
key_claims.source: Third-party reporting (SiliconANGLE T3, CBS News T2); not from Anthropic's Rule 135 notice

items.title: Suno raises $400M Series D at $5.4B valuation with licensed music model in development

key_claims.claim: $400M Series D, $5.4B valuation, led by Bond Capital
WMG licensing partnership since November 2025
First industry-licensed model in development, no release date given

items.caveats: Active copyright lawsuits from labels other than WMG ongoing. Licensed model has no confirmed release date.
